rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to register or log in with their details.
The system shall allow users to continue as a teacher or a student after logging in.
The system shall allow teachers to create a new quiz.
The system shall allow teachers to edit an existing quiz.
The system shall allow teachers to save a quiz as a draft or post it for students after working on it.
The system shall allow teachers to view quiz results once the quiz is over.
The system shall allow students to select a quiz after getting notified if they continue as a student.
The system shall allow students to answer the selected quiz.
The system shall allow students to submit their quiz after answering.
The system shall allow students to view the result after submitting the quiz.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to register or log in with their details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A user starts by registering or logging in with their details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After logging in, the system allows users to continue as a teacher or a student.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, the user may continue as a teacher or as a student.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the user continues as a teacher, they can create a new quiz.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user continues as a teacher, they can create a new quiz or edit an existing one.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Teachers can also edit an existing quiz.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user continues as a teacher, they can create a new quiz or edit an existing one.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After working on the quiz, teachers can save it as a draft or post it for students.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After working on the quiz, they can save it as a draft or post it for students.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once the quiz is over, teachers can view the results.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the quiz is over, the teacher can view the result.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the user continues as a student, they select a quiz after getting notified.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user continues as a student, they first select a quiz after getting notified.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After answering, students can submit their quiz.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once they are done or the time is over, they submit it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Students can view the result after submitting the quiz.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After submission, they can see the result and may also give feedback.
